title: This Claude Code Plugin Writes 94% Less Code (ponytail)
summary: Ponytail is a Claude Code plugin that reduces code generation by enforcing the YAGNI principle, directing AI agents to use native platform features and standard libraries before writing custom code. It claims to cut costs up to 77% while reducing code output by 94%.
